scopeStatus: Task 5 added only URL handoff; no browser UI, persistence, alternate opener, or old extension source.
compatStatus: One shared http/https URL maps to the existing vulpra://open router contract; public API remains the sole path.
retirementStatus: Old OpenIn implementation and all private/responder fallbacks remain absent; device failure is still the only amendment trigger.
newRiskSignals: Host-opening success is device-only evidence and remains explicitly open.
